task.name: omilrec-br111-speed-opt
task.goal: Optimize OMILREC speed from the local Br1.11.0 clean baseline only. Minimize ms/evt while keeping every per-candidate gate green: FCN drift <=1e-13, consistency within 4mm/7keV, multithread output bit-identical, and no speed regression above +5%. Candidates must use facts verified in this clean package and edit only admitted OMILRECV2 source files.

checks.name: drift_ratchet
checks.success_criteria: HEAD drift does not exceed the ratchet contract versus HEAD~1.

checks.name: end_to_end_consistency
checks.success_criteria: Position error is at most 4 mm and energy error is at most 7 keV.

checks.name: multithread_consistency
checks.success_criteria: Multithreaded output is bit-identical after sort.

checks.name: speed_regression_gate
checks.success_criteria: Measured speed does not regress by more than +5% relative to the clean Br1.11.0 baseline on the same machine.
